changes: Added a complete player-facing Settings page.
Added sound, haptic, effects, theme, and accessibility controls.
Added player progress backup, restore, and reset.
Added install and update actions inside Settings.
Removed internal testing interfaces from the player runtime.
Added a strict production file allowlist and leakage audit.
Added a first-launch interactive tutorial before the campaign is shown.
Added clear-path, blocked-path, clockwise-rotation, and guided-practice lessons.
Added a skippable tutorial with locally stored completion.
Added How to play for replaying the tutorial from the More menu or footer.
Kept tutorial actions separate from campaign scores, feathers, and progress.
Added keyboard, screen-reader, reduced-motion, high-contrast, and mobile no-scroll support.
Added tutorial unit and browser regression tests.
Configured Gamelo Studio as the production publisher.
Configured public support at leincentes@gmail.com.
Configured the canonical production URL at leincentes.github.io/paper-flock.
Disabled the first-launch beta disclosure during normal production play.
Updated production privacy, terms, support, accessibility, credits, release notes, and known issues.
Preserved offline installation, local saves, mobile viewport locking, accessibility, recovery, and release evidence.
Version-froze Paper Flock as 1.0.
Locked active mobile gameplay to the visible viewport.
Removed page scrolling, bounce, and pull-to-refresh during puzzle play.
Added VisualViewport-aware sizing for mobile browser chrome changes.
Added responsive board fitting for short phones.
Added compact portrait and landscape layouts.
Moved secondary controls, support, and testing tools into an internally scrollable game menu.
Kept pinch zoom and accessibility gestures available.
Added mobile browser tests for no-scroll layout and control reachability.
Added a locked npm dependency tree and npm ci builds.
Added high-severity dependency auditing and pull-request dependency review.
Added weekly Dependabot updates for npm and GitHub Actions.
Added CodeQL analysis for JavaScript and workflow files.
Added CycloneDX SBOM generation.
Added GitHub release and SBOM provenance attestations.
Added importable CI quality evidence.
Added a creator-side production evidence center and explicit final sign-off.
Added deterministic release builds and SHA-256 asset manifests.
Added Chromium and WebKit Playwright quality gates.
Added Lighthouse performance and accessibility budgets.
Added local Web Vitals and long-task history.
Added startup recovery and local recovery export.
Added Terms, Credits, and Page Not Found screens.
Added production response-header templates.
Added production configuration validation and manual release workflow.
Added guided keyboard-only accessibility certification.
Added guided iPhone and iPad VoiceOver certification.
Added guided Android TalkBack certification.
Added guided large-text and contrast certification.
Added per-test JSON reports and combined JSON/CSV exports.
Added creator-side import, duplicate rejection, and missing-test guidance.
Replaced manual accessibility readiness checkboxes with report-based evidence.
Added accessibility reports to local app backups and production readiness.
Added user-selectable text size, higher contrast, and reduced motion.
Added keyboard arrow navigation between active birds.
Added modal focus trapping, Escape handling, and focus restoration.
Added screen-reader announcements for key gameplay events.
Added strong focus indicators, skip navigation, and 44px control targets.
Added forced-colors support and a public accessibility statement.
Added a self-only Content Security Policy and no-referrer policy.
Removed inline scripts from public information pages.
Added automated accessibility and security package auditing.
Added first-launch public-beta disclosure.
Added privacy, support, release-notes, and known-issues pages.
Added local feedback and defect-report JSON export.
Added creator-side feedback import and aggregation.
Added public-beta and production-readiness dashboard.
Added release-operation verification and exportable readiness report.
Added beta and mobile-certification data to app backups.
Added guided Android and iPhone/iPad certification reports.
Added cross-platform installation certification aggregation.
Added package and deployment installability audits.
Added mobile installation checklist and offline-resource validation.
Added stable storage keys, corrupt-save recovery, and exact puzzle resume.
